/usr/bin/c++   -std=c++11 -Wall -O3 -g  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/uav_utils-test.dir/src/uav_utils_test.cpp.o  -o /home/hldrz/IntelligentUAVChampionship/basic_dev/devel/.private/uav_utils/lib/uav_utils/uav_utils-test   -L/home/hldrz/IntelligentUAVChampionship/basic_dev/build/uav_utils/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hldrz/IntelligentUAVChampionship/basic_dev/build/uav_utils/gtest:/home/hldrz/IntelligentUAVChampionship/basic_dev/build/uav_utils/gtest/lib gtest/lib/libgtest.so -luav_utils -lpthread
